## What this PR does

One paragraph. What changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #___ (required for anything that changes an ID, introduces vocabulary,
adds a pattern, or proposes a gap — per CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Type

- [ ] New pattern (must include diagram, runnable example, and anti-pattern)
- [ ] New gap (must include reproducible scenario and heuristic / trust-stage ref)
- [ ] Teardown (must use `agent-ux-teardowns/_template/` and pass schema validation)
- [ ] Framework edit (must include rationale, ID migration note if renamed, updated examples)
- [ ] Schema fix
- [ ] Doc fix / typo / link
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Contribution bar — checklist

Per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md):

- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] If this introduces or renames an ID, I opened a `debate` Issue first.
- [ ] If this adds a pattern, it has a diagram, a runnable example, and an anti-pattern.
- [ ] If this adds a gap, it has a reproducible scenario and references a heuristic or trust stage.
- [ ] CI passes (schema validation, link check).
- [ ] No emoji in code or schemas.
- [ ] Short sentences. Named things over adjectives.

## Out of scope

What this PR is **not** doing — to keep review tight.

---

> Review is in the open. Debates happen here, not in DMs.
